data.title: UiPath Hit By Slowing ARR Growth, Deal Timing Woes: Analyst Remains Optimistic For AI, Cloud Spark
data.description: UiPath Inc (NYSE: PATH) stock declined on weak Q4 revenue and Q1 guidance. Needham analyst reiterated Hold. Deal delays and uncertainty in US Fed segment.

data.title: IBM Brings Europe's First Quantum System Two To Spain: Details
data.description: IBM  ismaking significant strides in the quantum computing field with plans to install Europe's first IBM Quantum System Two at the IBM-Euskadi Quantum Computational Center in San Sebastian, Spain.

data.title: SL Green Realty Options Trading: A Deep Dive into Market Sentiment

American Eagle Outfitters Faces Slower Q1 After Strong Holidays, Analyst Trims Forecast
data.description: Telsey Advisory Group analyst Dana Telsey has maintained a Market Perform rating on American Eagle Outfitters and lowered its price target from $18 to $12. Despite exceeding fourth-quarter EPS estimates, AEO's FY25 outlook is weaker than expected.
